summary: Iteration 155: Elemental Nexus Phase 1 - ALL TESTS PASSED (28/28 backend, all frontend UI verified). New features: Dynamic Decay & Momentum (half-life logic), Birth Resonance Calibration (natal baseline from birth date), Frequency-Task Pairing (Hz frequencies mapped to alignment tasks), Bridge UI Transitions (trend indicators, constructive/destructive cycle glow), Cosmic Weather Dashboard Widget.
seed_data_creation: Birth resonance already set for test user (Cancer sign, June 22, 1979)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Elemental Nexus Phase 1 fully implemented and tested. Backend routes at /app/backend/routes/nexus.py. Frontend at /app/frontend/src/pages/ElementalNexus.js. Cosmic Weather widget on Dashboard at /app/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.js (CosmicWeatherSection component). Key data-testids: nexus-page, harmony-gauge, element-rings, element-{wood|fire|earth|metal|water}, decay-freshness, element-flow, birth-resonance-card, birth-resonance-uncalibrated, nexus-settings-btn, birth-modal, birth-month, birth-day, birth-year, birth-submit, birth-cancel, alignment-{element}, freq-{element}, cosmic-weather-widget, cosmic-weather-card, weather-see-all. Element frequencies: wood=528Hz, fire=396Hz, earth=174Hz, metal=285Hz, water=432Hz.

GET /api/nexus/state.details: Returns harmony_score, harmony_trend, harmony_cycle, decay_activity, natal, element_frequencies, trend_values, elements with percentages and status

POST /api/nexus/birth-resonance.details: Sets birth resonance with birth_month=6, birth_day=22, birth_year=1979 returns Cancer sign with natal_weights

GET /api/nexus/birth-resonance.details: Returns calibrated=true with sign, life_path, boosted_element, natal_weights

POST /api/nexus/align.details: Returns frequency data (hz, label, mantra), flow animation info (from, to, type), xp_awarded, dust_awarded

GET /api/reports/cosmic-weather.details: Returns forecast, zodiac (sign, element), lunar (phase, energy, xp_bonus), tool_recommendations (mixer with freq, sacred_text), rpg_bonuses

Frontend ElementalNexus page.details: Page loads with harmony-gauge, element-rings (5 elements with percentages), decay-freshness bar, element-flow visualization, birth-resonance-card

Frontend birth modal.details: Opens when clicking settings button or uncalibrated card, has month/day/year inputs

Frontend alignment cards.details: Shows frequency pairing info (Hz and mantra) for imbalanced elements

Frontend harmony gauge.details: Shows constructive/destructive/neutral cycle state with trend indicator

Dashboard cosmic-weather-widget.details: Renders showing zodiac season (Aries), lunar phase (Waxing Gibbous), AI forecast, frequency chip (528Hz), XP bonus chip (+10 XP)
